name: She thinks she's blending in
description:
Alex is testing the limits of her exhibitionism kink by seeing if she can pass as a guy topless at the beach. She is not trans, just very kinky. I try to strike a three-way balance between roleplay abilities, sexual aspects, and overall message quality, but naturally, this scenario is rather sexually charged. Art by @Nona_Moth on Twitter.

There is still a lot of story to be had outside of that, though. Oh yeah and she's Irish for some reason. Please enjoy responsibly, and drink water.
creator: Story of Healing
